!DOCTYPE html html lang=ja head meta charset=UTF-8 meta name=viewport content=width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0 titleスマホで選び隊title style root { --bg #fffaf2; --card #ffffff; --main #0d3d88; --sub #e5392d; --accent #ffd43b; --soft #eef5ff; --cream #fffdf8; --line #c9d8ef; --text #13325f; --muted #5a6f8f; --shadow rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.10); --shadow-strong rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.20); } { box-sizing border-box; } body { margin 0; font-family Hiragino Sans, Yu Gothic, sans-serif; color var(--text); background radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(255, 212, 59, 0.20), transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, rgba(229, 57, 45, 0.12), transparent 26%), linear-gradient(180deg, #fffdf8 0%, #fffaf2 100%); padding-top 58px; } .status { position fixed; top 0; left 0; right 0; z-index 1200; padding 12px 16px; color var(--main); background rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.90); border-bottom 2px solid rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.12); box-shadow 0 4px 16px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.06); text-align center; font-size 15px; font-weight 700; backdrop-filter blur(14px); } header { max-width 1000px; margin 18px auto 0; padding 20px 22px; border-radius 26px; background linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border 4px solid var(--main); color var(--text); text-align center; box-shadow 0 14px 34px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.12); } header h1 { margin 0; font-size 32px; line-height 1.15; letter-spacing 0.03em; font-weight 900; color var(--sub); text-shadow 2px 2px 0 #ffffff, 0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,0.7); } header p { margin 10px auto 0; max-width 620px; font-size 14px; font-weight 800; color white; background linear-gradient(90deg, #0d3d88 0%, #2459ad 100%); padding 8px 14px; border-radius 999px; box-shadow 0 6px 14px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.14); } main { max-width 1000px; margin 0 auto; padding 24px; padding-bottom 104px; } section { background rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94); border 1px solid rgba(201, 216, 239, 0.95); border-radius 30px; padding 26px; margin-bottom 22px; box-shadow 0 12px 32px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.07); backdrop-filter blur(10px); } h2 { margin 0 0 18px; color var(--main); font-size 22px; letter-spacing 0.04em; font-weight 800; } h3 { color var(--main); margin 0 0 12px; font-size 18px; letter-spacing 0.03em; } .step-note { margin-top 6px; font-size 14px; color var(--muted); line-height 1.8; } .budget-slider-area { margin-top 18px; padding 24px; border-radius 26px; background linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff, #eef5ff); border 1px solid var(--line); } .budget-display { font-size 34px; font-weight 800; color var(--main); text-align center; margin-bottom 16px; } .budget-display span { font-size 50px; letter-spacing 0.03em; color var(--sub); } input[type=range] { width 100%; accent-color var(--accent); cursor pointer; } .range-labels { display flex; justify-content space-between; margin-top 8px; color var(--muted); font-size 13px; font-weight 700; } button { font-family inherit; } .primary-button { width 100%; margin-top 18px; padding 15px 20px; border none; border-radius 999px; background var(--sub); color white; font-size 16px; font-weight 800; cursor pointer; transition transform 0.15s ease, background 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; box-shadow 0 10px 22px rgba(229, 57, 45, 0.20); } .primary-buttonhover { background #cf2f25; transform translateY(-1px); box-shadow 0 12px 26px rgba(229, 57, 45, 0.24); } #productSelectSection { display block; } .mode-buttons { display grid; grid-template-columns repeat(3, 1fr); gap 8px; padding 6px; background #eef5ff; border 1px solid var(--line); border-radius 999px; margin 18px 0 24px; } .mode-buttons button { padding 13px 14px; border none; border-radius 999px; background transparent; color var(--main); font-size 15px; font-weight 800; cursor pointer; transition 0.15s ease; } .mode-buttons button.active { background var(--main); color white; box-shadow 0 7px 18px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.28); } .mode-area { display none; animation fadeIn 0.25s ease; } .mode-area.active { display block; } @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity 0; transform translateY(6px); } to { opacity 1; transform translateY(0); } } .recommend-buttons, .category-buttons { display flex; flex-wrap wrap; gap 8px; margin 14px 0 20px; } .recommend-buttons button, .category-buttons button { padding 10px 16px; border 1px solid var(--line); border-radius 999px; background rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96); color var(--main); font-size 14px; font-weight 700; cursor pointer; transition 0.15s ease; } .recommend-buttons buttonhover, .category-buttons buttonhover { background #f4f8ff; border-color var(--main); } .product-list { display grid; grid-template-columns repeat(auto-fit, minmax(190px, 1fr)); gap 18px; } .product-card { position relative; min-height 185px; padding 18px; border 1px solid var(--line); border-radius 28px; background rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98); cursor pointer; box-shadow 0 8px 22px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.06); transition transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease; overflow hidden; } .product-cardbefore { content ; position absolute; top -40px; right -40px; width 104px; height 104px; border-radius 50%; background rgba(255, 212, 59, 0.18); z-index 0; } .product-cardhover { transform translateY(-4px); border-color var(--main); box-shadow 0 14px 30px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.12); } .product-card.selected { border 2px solid var(--sub); background #fffdf8; box-shadow 0 16px 36px rgba(229, 57, 45, 0.18); } .product-card.popular { background linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff, #fff8df); } .product-card.unaffordable { opacity 0.42; filter grayscale(25%); background #f3f5f8; } .product-card.unaffordablehover { transform none; box-shadow 0 8px 22px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.06); border-color var(--line); } .product-card.unaffordableafter { content 残金不足; position absolute; top 14px; left 14px; padding 4px 10px; border-radius 999px; background rgba(90, 111, 143, 0.18); color var(--muted); font-size 12px; font-weight 800; z-index 2; } .card-main { position relative; z-index 1; text-align center; } .emoji { font-size 42px; margin-bottom 8px; } .product-card h3 { margin 6px 0; font-size 18px; color var(--text); font-weight 800; } .category-label { display inline-block; padding 4px 10px; border-radius 999px; background var(--soft); color var(--main); font-size 12px; font-weight 700; border 1px solid #d8e4f6; } .price { margin-top 10px; color var(--sub); font-weight 800; font-size 20px; } .selected-detail { position relative; z-index 1; margin-top 16px; padding-top 14px; border-top 1px dashed var(--line); animation fadeIn 0.2s ease; } .detail-row { display flex; justify-content space-between; gap 10px; margin 6px 0; font-size 14px; color var(--muted); } .detail-row strong { color var(--main); } .after-budget { color var(--sub); font-weight 800; } .add-button { width 100%; margin-top 12px; padding 12px 16px; border none; border-radius 999px; background var(--accent); color var(--main); font-size 15px; font-weight 900; cursor pointer; transition 0.15s ease; box-shadow 0 8px 18px rgba(255, 212, 59, 0.28); } .add-buttonhover { background #f7ca1a; } .cart-button { position fixed; right 22px; bottom 22px; background var(--main); color white; border none; border-radius 50%; width 72px; height 72px; font-size 30px; box-shadow 0 12px 30px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.28); cursor pointer; z-index 999; transition 0.15s ease; } .cart-buttonhover { background #0a3170; transform translateY(-1px); } .cart-count { position absolute; top -5px; right -5px; background var(--sub); color white; border-radius 50%; width 27px; height 27px; font-size 14px; font-weight 800; line-height 27px; border 2px solid white; } .toast { position fixed; left 50%; bottom 110px; transform translateX(-50%); background var(--main); color white; padding 12px 20px; border-radius 999px; font-weight 800; box-shadow 0 10px 26px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.26); opacity 0; pointer-events none; transition opacity 0.3s ease; z-index 1000; } .toast.show { opacity 1; } #cartPage { display none; } .cart-item { display flex; justify-content space-between; align-items center; gap 12px; padding 14px 0; border-bottom 1px solid var(--line); } .cart-item button { margin-left 8px; padding 6px 10px; border none; border-radius 999px; background var(--soft); color var(--main); cursor pointer; font-weight 700; } .cart-item buttonhover { background #dfeaff; } .total { margin-top 18px; text-align right; font-size 24px; font-weight 800; color var(--main); } .warning { text-align right; margin-top 8px; color var(--muted); font-weight 800; } .complete-message { margin-top 18px; padding 16px; border-radius 18px; background var(--soft); border 1px solid var(--line); font-weight 800; text-align center; color var(--main); } .back-button { margin-top 18px; padding 12px 18px; border none; border-radius 999px; background var(--sub); color white; cursor pointer; font-size 15px; font-weight 800; } .back-buttonhover { background #cf2f25; } .decision-button { width 100%; margin-top 18px; padding 15px 20px; border none; border-radius 999px; background var(--main); color white; font-size 17px; font-weight 900; cursor pointer; box-shadow 0 10px 24px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.24); transition 0.15s ease; } .decision-buttonhover { background #0a3170; transform translateY(-1px); } #goPage, #surveyPage { display none; } .go-card { text-align center; overflow hidden; } .go-title { margin 0; color var(--sub); font-size 40px; font-weight 900; letter-spacing 0.05em; } .go-subtitle { margin 10px 0 18px; color var(--main); font-weight 800; line-height 1.8; } .poster-image { display block; width min(100%, 420px); margin 0 auto 20px; border-radius 24px; border 3px solid var(--main); box-shadow 0 14px 32px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.16); background white; } .go-summary { margin 18px auto; padding 16px; max-width 520px; border-radius 22px; background var(--soft); border 1px solid var(--line); color var(--main); font-weight 800; line-height 1.8; } .survey-form { display grid; gap 18px; } .survey-question { padding 16px; border 1px solid var(--line); border-radius 22px; background #fffdf8; } .survey-question p { margin 0 0 10px; color var(--main); font-weight 900; } .survey-options { display grid; gap 8px; } .survey-options label { display block; padding 10px 12px; border-radius 16px; background white; border 1px solid rgba(201, 216, 239, 0.85); cursor pointer; font-weight 700; color var(--text); } textarea { width 100%; min-height 110px; padding 12px; border-radius 16px; border 1px solid var(--line); font-family inherit; font-size 15px; resize vertical; } .thanks-message { display none; margin-top 16px; padding 16px; border-radius 18px; background var(--soft); border 1px solid var(--line); color var(--main); font-weight 900; text-align center; } @media (max-width 760px) { body { padding-top 54px; background radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(255, 212, 59, 0.16), transparent 28%), linear-gradient(180deg, #fffdf8 0%, #fffaf2 100%); } .status { font-size 12px; padding 9px 8px; line-height 1.45; } header { max-width calc(100% - 20px); margin 10px 10px 0; border-radius 20px; padding 14px 12px; border-width 3px; box-shadow 0 10px 24px rgba(13, 61, 136, 0.10); } header h1 { font-size 24px; line-height 1.1; } header p { font-size 12px; padding 7px 10px; margin-top 7px; line-height 1.45; } main { padding 12px; padding-bottom 86px; } section { padding 14px; border-radius 22px; margin-bottom 14px; } h2 { font-size 19px; margin-bottom 12px; } h3 { font-size 16px; margin-bottom 10px; } .budget-slider-area { margin-top 10px; padding 14px; border-radius 18px; } .budget-display { font-size 24px; margin-bottom 10px; } .budget-display span { font-size 38px; } .primary-button { margin-top 12px; padding 13px 16px; font-size 15px; } .mode-buttons { grid-template-columns repeat(3, 1fr); gap 5px; padding 5px; border-radius 18px; margin 12px 0 16px; } .mode-buttons button { padding 10px 6px; font-size 13px; } .recommend-buttons, .category-buttons { flex-wrap nowrap; overflow-x auto; gap 7px; margin 10px -2px 16px; padding 0 2px 6px; -webkit-overflow-scrolling touch; } .recommend-buttons button, .category-buttons button { flex 0 0 auto; padding 9px 13px; font-size 13px; white-space nowrap; } .product-list { grid-template-columns 1fr; gap 10px; } .product-card { min-height auto; padding 12px; border-radius 18px; } .product-cardbefore { width 74px; height 74px; top -32px; right -32px; } .product-cardhover { transform none; } .product-card.unaffordableafter { top 8px; left 8px; font-size 10px; padding 3px 8px; } .card-main { display grid; grid-template-columns 48px 1fr 45px; grid-template-rows auto auto; column-gap 12px; row-gap 6px; text-align left; align-items center; } .emoji { grid-row 1 span 2; grid-column 1; font-size 36px; margin 0; text-align center; display flex; align-items center; justify-content center; } .product-card h3 { grid-column 2; grid-row 1; margin 0 0 0 50px; font-size 14px; line-height 1.4; white-space normal; overflow visible; word-break break-word; } .category-label { grid-column 2; grid-row 2; width fit-content; max-width 100%; padding 2px 6px; font-size 12px; white-space nowrap; overflow hidden; text-overflow ellipsis; opacity 0.8; } .price { grid-column 3; grid-row 1 span 2; margin 30px 0 0 0; font-size 16px; white-space nowrap; display flex; align-items center; justify-content flex-end; height 100%; } .selected-detail { margin-top 10px; padding-top 10px; } .detail-row { font-size 13px; } .add-button { padding 11px 14px; font-size 14px; } .cart-button { width 58px; height 58px; right 16px; bottom 16px; font-size 24px; } .cart-count { width 24px; height 24px; line-height 24px; font-size 12px; } .cart-item { align-items flex-start; font-size 14px; } .total { font-size 21px; } .go-title { font-size 32px; } .poster-image { width min(100%, 300px); border-radius 50%; } .go-summary { font-size 14px; } .decision-button { font-size 16px; padding 14px 18px; } .toast { width 86%; text-align center; bottom 88px; font-size 13px; } } ===== 戦隊デザイン版：機能はそのまま、見た目だけ変更 ===== root { --main #0757c8; --sub #ef3128; --accent #ffc400; --soft #eef7ff; --cream #fff8e8; --line #d5e4f7; --text #071a43; --muted #5d6b86; } body { background radial-gradient(circle at 0% 0%, rgba(255,196,0,.24), transparent 24%), radial-gradient(circle at 100% 10%, rgba(21,136,255,.18), transparent 24%), linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #eef9ff 62%, #ffffff 100%); color var(--text); padding-top 0; padding-bottom 190px; } .status { position sticky; top 0; background rgba(255,255,255,.94); color var(--text); border-bottom 1px solid rgba(7,87,200,.12); box-shadow 0 4px 18px rgba(4,48,118,.08); z-index 1500; } .hero-top { max-width 1000px; margin 8px auto 0; border-radius 0 0 28px 28px; overflow hidden; background #fff; border 2px solid rgba(7,87,200,.10); box-shadow 0 14px 34px rgba(4,48,118,.16); } .hero-top-image { width 100%; display block; } .hero-feature-bar { display grid; grid-template-columns repeat(3, 1fr); gap 1px; padding 10px; background linear-gradient(90deg, #0757c8, #07347e); } .hero-feature-bar div { color #fff; text-align center; font-weight 900; font-size 14px; padding 10px 6px; border-radius 14px; background linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.17), rgba(255,255,255,.07)); text-shadow 0 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.16); } main { max-width 1000px; padding 16px 18px 26px; } section { background #fff; border-radius 26px; border 1px solid rgba(7,87,200,.10); box-shadow 0 8px 22px rgba(4,48,118,.10); margin-bottom 16px; padding 18px; } h2 { color var(--text); font-size clamp(24px, 5vw, 34px); font-weight 900; letter-spacing 0; } h2before { content ¥; display inline-grid; place-items center; width 46px; height 46px; margin-right 10px; border-radius 999px; background linear-gradient(135deg, #1c75e8, #06357e); color #fff; font-size 24px; box-shadow 0 8px 18px rgba(4,48,118,.14); vertical-align middle; } #productSelectSection h2before, #cartPage h2before, #goPage h2before, #surveyPage h2before { content none; } .budget-slider-area { background #fff; border 0; padding 4px 0 0; margin-top 8px; } .budget-display { margin 10px 0 12px; color var(--main); font-size clamp(42px, 12vw, 70px); font-weight 900; letter-spacing .02em; text-shadow 0 4px 0 rgba(7,87,200,.08); } .budget-display span { color var(--main); font-size inherit; } input[type=range] { accent-color var(--main); } .range-labels { color var(--text); font-size 14px; font-weight 900; } .primary-button { margin-top 14px; background linear-gradient(135deg, var(--sub), #ff6735); box-shadow 0 10px 20px rgba(239,49,40,.24); font-weight 900; } .mode-buttons { display grid; grid-template-columns repeat(3, 1fr); margin -18px -18px 18px; padding 0; gap 0; border-radius 26px 26px 0 0; overflow hidden; background #fff; border 0; border-bottom 1px solid var(--line); } .mode-buttons button { border-radius 0; padding 17px 8px; color var(--text); background #fff; font-size 18px; font-weight 900; } .mode-buttons button + button { border-left 1px solid var(--line); } .mode-buttons button.active { position relative; background linear-gradient(180deg, #0b63d8, #073e9d); color #fff; box-shadow none; } .mode-buttons button.activeafter { content ; position absolute; left 50%; bottom -1px; transform translateX(-50%); border-left 12px solid transparent; border-right 12px solid transparent; border-top 12px solid #073e9d; } .mode-area h3 { color var(--text); font-size 20px; font-weight 900; } .recommend-buttons, .category-buttons { gap 8px; } .recommend-buttons button, .category-buttons button { border 1px solid var(--line); background #fff; color var(--text); border-radius 999px; font-weight 900; } .recommend-buttons buttonhover, .category-buttons buttonhover { background var(--accent); border-color transparent; } .product-list { display grid; grid-auto-flow column; grid-auto-columns minmax(215px, 31%); grid-template-columns none; gap 14px; overflow-x auto; padding 2px 0 12px; scroll-snap-type x mandatory; -webkit-overflow-scrolling touch; } .product-card { scroll-snap-align start; min-height 300px; border-radius 22px; border 1px solid var(--line); background #fff; box-shadow 0 8px 22px rgba(4,48,118,.10); padding 14px; } .product-cardbefore { display none; } .product-cardhover { transform translateY(-3px); border-color rgba(7,87,200,.25); box-shadow 0 14px 34px rgba(4,48,118,.16); } .product-card.selected { border 3px solid var(--accent); background #fff; box-shadow 0 14px 34px rgba(4,48,118,.16); } .product-card.popularafter { content 人気No.1; position absolute; top 12px; left 12px; z-index 3; border-radius 999px; padding 5px 10px; background linear-gradient(135deg, var(--sub), #ff8b35); color #fff; font-size 12px; font-weight 900; } .product-card.unaffordableafter { left auto; right 12px; top 12px; } .emoji { width 100px; height 100px; margin 28px auto 12px; display grid; place-items center; border-radius 24px; background linear-gradient(180deg, #f0f7ff, #fff8e1); border 1px solid var(--line); font-size 48px; box-shadow inset 0 -8px 18px rgba(7,87,200,.05); } .product-card h3 { min-height 50px; color var(--text); font-size 16px; line-height 1.45; font-weight 900; } .category-label { margin-top 9px; background #f2eadb; color #4f4a3d; padding 5px 9px; border-radius 8px; border 0; font-size 12px; font-weight 900; } .price { color var(--sub); font-size 30px; font-weight 900; } .selected-detail { border-top 1px dashed var(--line); } .add-button { border 2px solid var(--text); background #fff; color var(--text); box-shadow none; } .product-card.selected .add-button { border-color transparent; background var(--accent); } .fixed-actions { position fixed; left 50%; bottom 10px; transform translateX(-50%); z-index 1300; width min(1000px, calc(100% - 18px)); display grid; gap 9px; } .cart-button { position relative; inset auto; width 100%; height auto; min-height 76px; border-radius 20px; background linear-gradient(135deg, #0757c8, #06347e); color #fff; box-shadow 0 14px 34px rgba(6,52,126,.33); display flex; align-items center; justify-content space-between; gap 12px; padding 12px 14px; font-size 16px; text-align left; } .cart-buttonhover { background linear-gradient(135deg, #0757c8, #06347e); transform none; } .cart-icon-wrap { position relative; width 52px; height 52px; border-radius 16px; background rgba(255,255,255,.14); display grid; place-items center; font-size 27px; flex-shrink 0; } .cart-icon-wrap .cart-count { top -5px; right -5px; } .cart-text { display grid; gap 3px; min-width 0; flex 1; } .cart-text strong { font-size 16px; font-weight 900; } .cart-text small { opacity .92; font-size 12px; font-weight 700; } .cart-total-fixed { font-size 18px; font-weight 900; white-space nowrap; } .cart-view-text { border-radius 999px; background #fff; color var(--main); padding 11px 16px; font-size 14px; font-weight 900; white-space nowrap; } .cart-count { line-height 24px; } .decision-fixed-row { display grid; grid-template-columns 1fr 1fr; gap 10px; } .fixed-decide-button, .fixed-go-button { border 0; border-radius 18px; min-height 62px; font-weight 900; font-size clamp(20px, 5vw, 30px); cursor pointer; box-shadow 0 8px 22px rgba(4,48,118,.10); } .fixed-decide-button { background #fff; color var(--main); border 3px solid var(--main); } .fixed-go-button { background linear-gradient(135deg, var(--sub), #ff6a35); color #fff; } .go-title { color var(--sub); } .poster-image { border-radius 50%; } .decision-button { background linear-gradient(135deg, var(--sub), #ff6a35); box-shadow 0 10px 22px rgba(239,49,40,.22); } .toast { bottom 198px; } @media (max-width 760px) { body { padding-bottom 202px; } .status { font-size 12px; } .hero-top { max-width calc(100% - 14px); margin-top 6px; border-radius 0 0 24px 24px; } .hero-feature-bar { grid-template-columns 1fr; } main { padding 14px 7px 24px; } section { padding 14px; border-radius 24px; } h2before { width 42px; height 42px; font-size 22px; } .mode-buttons { margin -14px -14px 16px; border-radius 24px 24px 0 0; grid-template-columns 1fr; } .mode-buttons button + button { border-left 0; border-top 1px solid var(--line); } .product-list { grid-auto-columns 82%; } .product-card { display block; min-height 300px; } .cart-button { min-height 72px; padding 11px; } .cart-text strong { font-size 14px; } .cart-total-fixed { font-size 15px; } .cart-view-text { padding 10px 12px; font-size 13px; } .fixed-decide-button, .fixed-go-button { min-height 58px; font-size 20px; } .toast { bottom 206px; } } ===== 下部固定エリア：カートボタンだけ表示 ===== body { padding-bottom 112px; } .fixed-actions { gap 0; } .decision-fixed-row { display none !important; } .toast { bottom 118px; } @media (max-width 760px) { body { padding-bottom 118px; } .toast { bottom 126px; } } ===== 上部ヒーロー画像：横長バナー用に調整 ===== .hero-top { max-width 1000px; margin 8px auto 16px; border-radius 0 0 28px 28px; overflow hidden; background #ffffff; box-shadow 0 10px 24px rgba(0, 70, 160, 0.18); } .hero-top-image { display block; width 100%; height auto; object-fit contain; } @media (max-width 760px) { .hero-top { width calc(100% - 14px); margin 6px auto 14px; border-radius 0 0 20px 20px; } .hero-top-image { width 100%; height auto; object-fit contain; } } ===== 商品一覧：横スライドではなく、下に並べて全部見えるように変更 ===== .product-list { display grid !important; grid-auto-flow row !important; grid-template-columns repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr)) !important; grid-auto-columns initial !important; overflow-x visible !important; overflow-y visible !important; scroll-snap-type none !important; gap 14px !important; padding 2px 0 12px !important; } .product-card { scroll-snap-align none !important; width 100% !important; } @media (max-width 760px) { .product-list { grid-template-columns 1fr !important; gap 12px !important; } .product-card { min-height auto !important; } } ===== 生協へGO画面：買い物リストを見やすく表示 ===== .go-list-panel { width min(100%, 560px); margin 16px auto 18px; padding 16px; border-radius 18px; background #ffffff; border 1px solid rgba(10, 80, 170, 0.12); box-shadow 0 8px 18px rgba(10, 80, 170, 0.08); text-align left; } .go-list-heading { font-size 18px; font-weight 800; color #0b4cb3; margin-bottom 12px; } .go-summary { display grid; gap 10px; } .go-items { display grid; gap 10px; } .go-item { display flex; align-items center; justify-content space-between; gap 12px; padding 12px 14px; border-radius 14px; background #f7fbff; border 1px solid #d8e7fb; } .go-item-left { display flex; align-items center; gap 10px; min-width 0; } .go-item-check { width 28px; height 28px; border-radius 999px; background #0b4cb3; color #ffffff; display grid; place-items center; font-weight 700; flex-shrink 0; } .go-item-name { font-weight 700; color #20304a; line-height 1.4; } .go-item-price { font-weight 800; color #f15b2a; white-space nowrap; flex-shrink 0; } .go-meta { margin-top 4px; display grid; gap 8px; } .go-meta-row { display flex; justify-content space-between; align-items center; gap 12px; padding 12px 14px; border-radius 14px; background #fff6ef; border 1px solid #ffe1cf; font-weight 700; color #6b3d24; } .go-meta-row.remaining { background #eef7ff; border-color #d7e9ff; color #0b4cb3; } @media (max-width 768px) { .go-list-panel { width 100%; padding 14px; } .go-item { padding 11px 12px; } .go-item-name { font-size 14px; } .go-item-price, .go-meta-row { font-size 14px; } } style head body div class=status id=budgetStatusまだ予算が設定されていませんdiv section class=hero-top img src=hero-banner.png alt=スマホで選び隊 メインビジュアル class=hero-top-image div class=hero-feature-bar div⭐ 生協基準で安心div div⏰ 選ぶ時間を短縮div div👍 人気商品から提案div div section main id=mainPage section h2今日の予算を決めるh2 div class=budget-slider-area div class=budget-displayspan id=budgetPreview0span円div input type=range id=budgetSlider min=0 max=1500 step=10 value=0 oninput=updateBudgetPreview() div class=range-labelsspan0円spanspan1500円spandiv button class=primary-button onclick=setSliderBudget()この予算に決定button div section section id=productSelectSection h2商品を選ぶh2 div class=mode-buttons button id=recommendModeButton onclick=showMode('recommend')おすすめbutton button id=categoryModeButton onclick=showMode('category')カテゴリーbutton button id=popularModeButton onclick=showMode('popular')人気商品button div div id=recommendMode class=mode-area h3おすすめ商品h3 div class=recommend-buttonsbutton onclick=showRecommendations(1)＋1品でおすすめbuttonbutton onclick=showRecommendations(2)＋2品でおすすめbuttondiv div class=product-list id=recommendProductsdiv div div id=categoryMode class=mode-area h3カテゴリーから選ぶh3 div class=category-buttons id=categoryButtonsdiv div class=product-list id=categoryProductsdiv div div id=popularMode class=mode-area h3今日の人気商品h3 div class=product-list id=popularProductsdiv div section main main id=cartPage section h2買い物かごの確認h2 p class=step-note選んだ商品を確認して、実際に生協で迷わず購入できます。p div id=cartItemsdiv div class=total id=totalPricediv div class=warning id=budgetWarningdiv div class=complete-message内容を確認して、よければ決定してください。div button class=decision-button onclick=confirmPurchase()これで決定button button class=back-button onclick=showMainPage()商品選択に戻るbutton section main main id=goPage section class=go-card h2 class=go-title生協へGO！h2 p class=go-subtitleこの画面を見ながら、生協で商品を確認して購入できます。p img class=poster-image alt=スマホで選び隊アイコン div class=go-list-paneldiv class=go-list-heading今回の買い物リストdivdiv class=go-summary id=goSummarydivdiv button class=primary-button onclick=openGoogleForm()買い物後、アンケートに答えるbutton section main main id=surveyPage section h2アンケートh2 p class=step-note使ってみた感想を教えてください。今後の改善に活かします。p form class=survey-form onsubmit=submitSurvey(event) div class=survey-question p1. 商品は選びやすかったですか？p div class=survey-options labelinput type=radio name=easy value=とても選びやすい required とても選びやすいlabel labelinput type=radio name=easy value=まあまあ選びやすい まあまあ選びやすいlabel labelinput type=radio name=easy value=少し選びにくい 少し選びにくいlabel div div div class=survey-question p2. 予算内で選ぶ機能は役に立ちましたか？p div class=survey-options labelinput type=radio name=budgetHelpful value=とても役に立った required とても役に立ったlabel labelinput type=radio name=budgetHelpful value=少し役に立った 少し役に立ったlabel labelinput type=radio name=budgetHelpful value=あまり役に立たなかった あまり役に立たなかったlabel div div div class=survey-question p3. また使いたいと思いましたか？p div class=survey-options labelinput type=radio name=again value=使いたい required 使いたいlabel labelinput type=radio name=again value=どちらともいえない どちらともいえないlabel labelinput type=radio name=again value=あまり使わないと思う あまり使わないと思うlabel div div div class=survey-question p4. 改善してほしい点があれば教えてくださいp textarea name=comment placeholder=例：商品をもっと探しやすくしてほしい、カテゴリを増やしてほしい などtextarea div button class=primary-button type=submit回答を送信button form div class=thanks-message id=thanksMessage回答ありがとうございました！div button class=back-button onclick=showMainPage()トップに戻るbutton section main div class=fixed-actions button class=cart-button onclick=showCartPage() span class=cart-icon-wrap🛒span class=cart-count id=cartCount0spanspan span class=cart-text strongカートに入っている商品strong small id=cartSummaryTextまだ商品が選ばれていませんsmall span span class=cart-total-fixed id=cartTotalFixed合計 0円span span class=cart-view-textカートを見る ＞span button div div class=toast id=toastdiv script const GOOGLE_FORM_URL = 日清食品　オーベルジーヌ監修　欧風カレー, price 357, category スープ・カップ麺, popular false } ]; let budget = 0; let budgetSet = false; let cart = []; let selectedProduct = null; let currentCategory = all; let currentMode = ; let currentRecommendCount = 1; document.addEventListener(DOMContentLoaded, function () { updateBudgetStatus(); updateCartCount(); updateBudgetPreview(); createCategoryButtons(); showMode(popular); }); function getEmoji(product) { const category = product.category ; const name = product.name ; if (category.includes(おにぎり) name.includes(おにぎり) name.includes(おむすび)) return 🍙; if (category.includes(パン) name.includes(パン)) return 🥐; if (category.includes(サンド)) return 🥪; if (category.includes(弁当) name.includes(弁当) name.includes(丼) name.includes(カレー)) return 🍱; if (category.includes(麺) category.includes(カップ麺)) return 🍜; if (category.includes(スープ)) return 🥣; if (category.includes(サラダ)) return 🥗; if (category.includes(飲料) category.includes(ドリンク)) return 🥤; if (category.includes(デザート) category.includes(アイス)) return 🍨; if (category.includes(菓子)) return 🍪; return 🛒; } function updateBudgetPreview() { const slider = document.getElementById(budgetSlider); const preview = document.getElementById(budgetPreview); preview.textContent = slider.value; } function setSliderBudget() { const slider = document.getElementById(budgetSlider); budget = Number(slider.value); budgetSet = true; selectedProduct = null; updateBudgetStatus(); showMode(recommend); showToast(今日の予算を + budget + 円に設定しました！); } function getTotal() { return cart.reduce(function (sum, item) { return sum + item.price; }, 0); } function getRemainingBudget() { return budget - getTotal(); } function isAffordable(product) { if (!budgetSet) return true; return product.price = getRemainingBudget(); } function sortProductsByAffordable(productList) { if (!budgetSet) return productList; return productList.slice().sort(function (a, b) { const aAffordable = isAffordable(a); const bAffordable = isAffordable(b); if (aAffordable === bAffordable) return a.price - b.price; return aAffordable -1 1; }); } function updateBudgetStatus() { const status = document.getElementById(budgetStatus); if (!budgetSet) { status.textContent = まだ予算が設定されていません; return; } const total = getTotal(); const remaining = getRemainingBudget(); if (remaining = 0) { status.textContent = 今日の予算： + budget + 円 ／ 現在： + total + 円 ／ 残り： + remaining + 円; } else { status.textContent = 今日の予算： + budget + 円 ／ 現在： + total + 円 ／ + Math.abs(remaining) + 円オーバー; } } function createCategoryButtons() { const area = document.getElementById(categoryButtons); const categories = Array.from(new Set(products.map(function (product) { return product.category; }))); area.innerHTML = 'button onclick=showCategory('all')すべてbutton'; categories.forEach(function (category) { const button = document.createElement(button); button.textContent = category; button.onclick = function () { showCategory(category); }; area.appendChild(button); }); } function showMode(modeName) { currentMode = modeName; selectedProduct = null; const modes = [recommend, category, popular]; modes.forEach(function (mode) { document.getElementById(mode + Mode).classList.remove(active); document.getElementById(mode + ModeButton).classList.remove(active); }); document.getElementById(modeName + Mode).classList.add(active); document.getElementById(modeName + ModeButton).classList.add(active); if (modeName === recommend) showRecommendations(currentRecommendCount); if (modeName === category) showCategory(currentCategory); if (modeName === popular) displayPopularProducts(); } function displayPopularProducts() { const area = document.getElementById(popularProducts); area.innerHTML = ; const popularItems = products.filter(function (product) { return product.popular === true; }); const sortedItems = sortProductsByAffordable(popularItems); sortedItems.forEach(function (product) { area.appendChild(createProductCard(product, true)); }); } function showCategory(categoryName) { currentCategory = categoryName; const area = document.getElementById(categoryProducts); area.innerHTML = ; let categoryItems; if (categoryName === all) categoryItems = products; else categoryItems = products.filter(function (product) { return product.category === categoryName; }); const sortedItems = sortProductsByAffordable(categoryItems); sortedItems.forEach(function (product) { area.appendChild(createProductCard(product, false)); }); } function showRecommendations(count) { currentRecommendCount = count; const area = document.getElementById(recommendProducts); area.innerHTML = ; if (budget === 0) { area.innerHTML = p class='step-note'予算を決めると、残り予算に合わせたおすすめ商品が表示されます。p; return; } const remaining = getRemainingBudget(); if (remaining = 0) { area.innerHTML = p class='step-note'残り予算がありません。買い物かごを確認してください。p; return; } const cartIds = cart.map(function (item) { return item.id; }); const availableProducts = products.filter(function (product) { return !cartIds.includes(product.id) && product.price = remaining; }); let recommendations = []; if (count === 1) { recommendations = availableProducts.sort(function (a, b) { return b.price - a.price; }).slice(0, 4); } else { const halfBudget = remaining 2; recommendations = availableProducts .filter(function (product) { return product.price = halfBudget; }) .sort(function (a, b) { return b.price - a.price; }) .slice(0, 6); } if (recommendations.length === 0) { area.innerHTML = p class='step-note'残り予算で買える商品がありません。p; return; } recommendations.forEach(function (product) { area.appendChild(createProductCard(product, false)); }); } function createProductCard(product, isPopular) { const card = document.createElement(div); card.className = product-card; if (isPopular) card.classList.add(popular); if (!isAffordable(product)) card.classList.add(unaffordable); if (selectedProduct && selectedProduct.id === product.id) card.classList.add(selected); card.onclick = function () { selectProduct(product.id); }; let detailHtml = ; if (selectedProduct && selectedProduct.id === product.id) { let detailContent = ; if (!budgetSet) { detailContent = 'div class=detail-rowspan価格spanstrong' + product.price + '円strongdiv' + 'div class=detail-rowspan予算spanstrong未設定strongdiv'; } else { const remainingNow = getRemainingBudget(); const afterRemaining = remainingNow - product.price; let budgetText = afterRemaining = 0 'span class=after-budget' + afterRemaining + '円span' 'span class=after-budget' + Math.abs(afterRemaining) + '円オーバーspan'; detailContent = 'div class=detail-rowspan現在の残金spanstrong' + remainingNow + '円strongdiv' + 'div class=detail-rowspan追加後の残金spanstrong' + budgetText + 'strongdiv'; } detailHtml = 'div class=selected-detail' + detailContent + 'button class=add-button onclick=addProductToCart(event, ' + product.id + ')カゴに追加buttondiv'; } card.innerHTML = 'div class=card-main' + 'div class=emoji' + getEmoji(product) + 'div' + 'h3' + product.name + 'h3' + 'div class=category-label' + product.category + 'div' + 'div class=price' + product.price + '円div' + 'div' + detailHtml; return card; } function selectProduct(productId) { if (selectedProduct && selectedProduct.id === productId) selectedProduct = null; else selectedProduct = products.find(function (item) { return item.id === productId; }); refreshCurrentProductDisplay(); } function addProductToCart(event, productId) { event.stopPropagation(); const product = products.find(function (item) { return item.id === productId; }); if (!budgetSet) { alert(先に今日の予算を決定してください。); return; } if (getTotal() + product.price budget) { alert(残り予算が足りないため、この商品はカゴに追加できません。); return; } cart.push(product); selectedProduct = null; updateBudgetStatus(); updateCartCount(); refreshCurrentProductDisplay(); showToast(product.name + を買い物かごに入れました！); } function refreshCurrentProductDisplay() { if (currentMode === recommend) showRecommendations(currentRecommendCount); if (currentMode === category) showCategory(currentCategory); if (currentMode === popular) displayPopularProducts(); } function showToast(message) { const toast = document.getElementById(toast); toast.textContent = message; toast.classList.add(show); setTimeout(function () { toast.classList.remove(show); }, 1500); } function updateCartCount() { document.getElementById(cartCount).textContent = cart.length; const cartSummaryText = document.getElementById(cartSummaryText); const cartTotalFixed = document.getElementById(cartTotalFixed); if (cartSummaryText) { if (cart.length === 0) { cartSummaryText.textContent = まだ商品が選ばれていません; } else if (budgetSet) { cartSummaryText.textContent = 残り予算： + getRemainingBudget() + 円; } else { cartSummaryText.textContent = 商品点数： + cart.length + 点; } } if (cartTotalFixed) { cartTotalFixed.textContent = 合計 + getTotal() + 円; } } function hideAllPages() { document.getElementById(mainPage).style.display = none; document.getElementById(cartPage).style.display = none; document.getElementById(goPage).style.display = none; document.getElementById(surveyPage).style.display = none; } function showCartButton(show) { const fixedActions = document.querySelector(.fixed-actions); if (fixedActions) fixedActions.style.display = show grid none; } function showCartPage() { hideAllPages(); document.getElementById(cartPage).style.display = block; showCartButton(true); displayCartItems(); window.scrollTo(0, 0); } function showMainPage() { hideAllPages(); document.getElementById(mainPage).style.display = block; showCartButton(true); refreshCurrentProductDisplay(); window.scrollTo(0, 0); } function confirmPurchase() { if (cart.length === 0) { alert(商品がまだ選ばれていません。); return; } const total = getTotal(); const remaining = budget - total; const itemsHtml = cart.map(function (item, index) { return ` div class=go-item div class=go-item-left div class=go-item-check${index + 1}div div class=go-item-name${getEmoji(item)} ${item.name}div div div class=go-item-price${item.price}円div div `; }).join(); let summaryText = `div class=go-items${itemsHtml}div`; summaryText += ` div class=go-meta div class=go-meta-row span合計金額span span${total}円span div `; if (budgetSet) { summaryText += ` div class=go-meta-row remaining span残り予算span span${remaining}円span div `; } summaryText += `div`; document.getElementById(goSummary).innerHTML = summaryText; hideAllPages(); document.getElementById(goPage).style.display = block; showCartButton(false); window.scrollTo(0, 0); } function openGoogleForm() { if (!GOOGLE_FORM_URL) { alert(GoogleフォームのURLが設定されていません。); return; } window.open(GOOGLE_FORM_URL, _blank); } function showSurveyPage() { hideAllPages(); document.getElementById(surveyPage).style.display = block; showCartButton(false); window.scrollTo(0, 0); } function submitSurvey(event) { event.preventDefault(); document.getElementById(thanksMessage).style.display = block; showToast(回答ありがとうございました！); event.target.reset(); } function displayCartItems() { const area = document.getElementById(cartItems); const totalArea = document.getElementById(totalPrice); const warningArea = document.getElementById(budgetWarning); area.innerHTML = ; if (cart.length === 0) area.innerHTML = p class='step-note'まだ商品が選ばれていません。p; else { cart.forEach(function (item, index) { const div = document.createElement(div); div.className = cart-item; div.innerHTML = 'span' + getEmoji(item) + ' ' + item.name + 'span' + 'span' + item.price + '円' + 'button onclick=removeFromCart(' + index + ')削除buttonspan'; area.appendChild(div); }); } const total = getTotal(); const remaining = budget - total; totalArea.textContent = 合計： + total + 円; if (!budgetSet) warningArea.textContent = 予算が設定されていません。; else if (remaining = 0) warningArea.textContent = 残り予算： + remaining + 円; else warningArea.textContent = Math.abs(remaining) + 円オーバーしています。; } function removeFromCart(index) { cart.splice(index, 1); updateBudgetStatus(); updateCartCount(); displayCartItems(); refreshCurrentProductDisplay(); } script body html
